Interzenex

Virtual & Physical Cards

Get a virtual card instantly on signup, with a physical card shipped at no extra cost.

Instant Freeze

Lost your card, or just want a spending pause? Freeze it in seconds from your dashboard.

Real-Time Alerts

A notification the moment your card is used — no surprise charges days later.

International Usage Toggle

Turn international spending on before you travel, off when you don't need it.

Every account comes with a free virtual debit card from day one.
